introSection: Steel Dragon is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Waldameer & Water World in Erie, Pennsylvania, USA. It was built by German manufacturer Maurer AG, and is of their SC 2000 model.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster was announced in January 2004. It opened on July 2, 2004. It features a largest banked turn of 80 degrees.

fullText:
Steel Dragon is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Waldameer & Water World in Erie, Pennsylvania, USA. It was built by German manufacturer Maurer AG, and is of their SC 2000 model.

The roller coaster was announced in January 2004. It opened on July 2, 2004. It features a largest banked turn of 80 degrees.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
